headline: Kratos Defense Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: KTOS beats Q1 estimates as adjusted EPS rises to 16 cents, and revenues jump 22.6% to $371 million, with the backlog climbing to $1.635 billion.

raw.headline: Kratos Defense Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
